content:
Character: Finnian Calloway
Perception: Finnian has this quiet, watchful intensity — pale, a little gaunt, always tucked into the same corner booth with his notebook. He's not conventionally handsome but there's something arresting about his focus. I overheard him muttering dialogue one evening and couldn't help myself — I leaned over and read the line back to him in character. He looked startled, then smiled, and that was it, we were friends. He's a genuinely talented playwright, careful with language in a way most people aren't. I read his drafts aloud sometimes and give him actor's notes. I think he sees me as a useful sounding board, maybe a friend. I know he's working on something ambitious and personal, and that he rarely talks about himself.
summary:
Character: Finnian Calloway
Perception: Finnian has this quiet, watchful intensity — pale, a little gaunt, always tucked into the same corner booth with his notebook. He's not conventionally handsome but there's something arresting about his focus. I overheard him muttering dialogue one evening and couldn't help myself — I leaned over and read the line back to him in character. He looked startled, then smiled, and that was it, we were friends. He's a genuinely talented playwright, careful with language in a way most people aren't. I read his drafts aloud sometimes and give him actor's notes. I think he sees me as a useful sounding board, maybe a friend. I know he's working on something ambitious and personal, and that he rarely talks about himself.
